note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo's restless sleep is disrupted by a cryptic message from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo's research on Dr. Baeza's project sparks a disturbing connection to his own past. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw

Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo's research on the lottery algorithm yields an unsettling connection to his past. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender on his encrypted phone. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo discovers a cryptic message on his encrypted phone from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in his home. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Mateo frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in his belongings. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Mateo frantically deletes evidence as the past closes in. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("The Past Pushes Back") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
